message:
refactor(codegen): Consolidate parameter shadowing detection

Add wouldParamShadow() helper to NativeCodegen as single source of truth:
- Checks module_level_funcs, module_level_vars, imported_modules
- Checks module_level_from_imports (for `from X import Y`)
- Checks zig_keywords.wouldShadowMethod and wouldShadowModule

Update all parameter shadowing checks to use consolidated helper:
- class_methods.zig: 3 occurrences updated
- function_gen.zig: 3 occurrences updated (including forward vars)

This eliminates duplicated shadowing logic and ensures consistency.
